scripts.build: pnpm --filter @task-forge/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: npm run dev:migration && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev:backend
scripts.dev:migration: cross-env NODE_ENV=development DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.development npm run typeorm migration:run -- -d dist/database/data-source.js
scripts.mig:gen: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.development npm run typeorm migration:generate -- -d dist/database/data-source.js src/database/migrations/migration
scripts.mig:revert: cross-env NODE_ENV=development DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.development npm run typeorm migration:revert -- -d dist/database/data-source.js
